name: Playin Thru Golf LLC
address: 2425 Von Esch Rd Unit D, Plainfield, IL 60586
about: Playin Thru Golf LLC is a golf training and retail center located in Plainfield, IL, specializing in club fitting, instruction, and indoor golf simulator sessions. Celebrating its 30th year, the venue offers a comprehensive performance lab for golfers looking to improve their game, alongside a pro shop selling golf clubs, bags, balls, components, and accessories. The facility is open by appointment and emphasizes personalized service for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to serious players seeking equipment optimization and technical analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive performance lab for detailed swing analysis
Extensive retail pro shop with major brands like Callaway and TaylorMade
30 years of experience in fitting and instruction

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, but rental options may be available through their pro shop or performance lab services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention on-site food and beverage services, so external food and drink policies are unclear.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Time for an 18-hole simulator session is not specified and may vary depending on simulator technology and simulator usage.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Playin Thru Golf does not specifically mention kid-friendly amenities or programs, making it unclear if it is suitable for children.
